name: Cold Minted Pea Soup (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups finely chopped washed Boston lettuce
1 package (10 ounces) thawed frozen tiny peas
2 cups ice water or heavy cream
salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. When hot, add the onion to the pan. Cover and simmer gently for about 3 to 4 minutes or until tender.
3. Add the lettuce leaves and stir just until wilted.
4. Add the water and peas. Bring to a boil and cook for an additional 3 to 4 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and season with salt and pepper.
6. Puree the mixture through a food mill or in a food processor, incorporating the mint leaves.
7. Gradually add ice water or heavy cream until reaching the desired consistency.
8. Chill until serving time.
9. Before serving, adjust the seasoning if needed and garnish with chives and yogurt, if desired.
Yield: 4 servings
